meaning: vt.消灭,根除,毁灭,[医]摘除(肿瘤等)
examples: And to extirpate their wives depends on God.
To extirpate weeds is not only to destroy their visible parts but also to pull them out by the roots.
In at least one instance, a researcher predicts that global warming will extirpate one species from an entire region within 15 years.
